Question
========
What is an R script?

Answerlist
----------
* A text document where you can type, run, edit, and save R code
* A graphical interface for creating plots
* A file that only stores output from R calculations
* A read-only document that displays pre-written code
* A temporary workspace that cannot be saved

Solution
========


Answerlist
----------
* True. This is the correct definition provided in the text.
* False. Scripts are text documents for code, not graphical interfaces.
* False. Scripts store code, not just output.
* False. Scripts are editable, not read-only.
* False. Scripts can be saved permanently.

Meta-information
================
exname: script_def
extype: schoice
exsolution: 10000
exshuffle: TRUE
